name: Cyborg Runner
short_description: Endless Runner game where player controls cyborg, whose mission is to collect skulls and avoid spikes, moving enemies and other traps
detailed_description:
STORY:

Endless Runner 3d game where player controls cyborg. Mission is to survive as long as can and collect skulls. More time player survives more steam achievements he collects. There is several enemies which kills player and then need restart level. Moving enemies, spike enemies and also red balls kills player. Player can collect blue cubes which gives shield for limited time and then player can destroy enemies
Can you be the real endless runner master and collect 300 skulls to beat the game

FEATURES:
- Steam achievements
- Collectable skulls.
- Spikes and moving enemies which kill player.
- Red balls which kill player
- Shields which gives player ability to destroy enemies at limited time
- Slow motion feature
